name: data_audit
description: Tracks incoming data volumes, processed counts, errors, and duplicates per tenant. Consumes from pipeline Kafka topics and provides a REST API for querying audit data.

args.name: port
args.description: HTTP port for the REST API

args.name: flush-interval
args.description: Seconds between periodic counter flushes to DB

args.name: flush-threshold
args.description: Number of messages before flushing counters to DB
